name: stage-key-legibility
note: P1-6 (SDD persona goalpost): the Stage's glance key line (#pKeyLine, .pKey - the fastest thing a performer's eye checks mid-song) rendered SMALLER (.7rem/11.2px) than the artist line (.pArtist, .8rem/12.8px) beneath the title, inverting the visual hierarchy of what matters live. Fix: pKey >= pArtist's own size, with a 13px absolute floor. Red-first: pre-fix pKey computed font-size < pArtist's.

steps.label: seed a saved custom song with a chord sheet
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'keyLegibilitySong', t:'Key Legibility Song', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, seq:['C','G','Am','F'], sheet:[['Verse','[C] a [G] b [Am] c [F] d']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: the Stage is open with a live key line
pKey's computed font-size is >= pArtist's AND >= a 13px absolute floor (FAILS pre-fix: pKey .7rem/11.2px < pArtist .8rem/12.8px < 13px)
